title: myrica gale var. subglabra
intro: Myrica gale var. subglabra, also known as bog myrtle, is a variety of the Myrica gale plant that is native to Europe and Asia. This shrub-like plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of bog myrtle include relief from respiratory issues such as bronchitis and asthma, as well as its ability to boost the immune system and reduce fever. Bog myrtle can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in herbal remedies to promote overall well-being and combat infection.
